allow: PowerShell($tries = 0; while \($tries -lt 20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4299" -TimeoutSec 2 -ErrorAction Stop; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "UP"; break } } catch {} Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $tries++ }; if \($tries -ge 20\) { Write-Output "TIMEOUT" })
